title: Techno%20Brain%20Microsoft%20Dynamics%20Brochure
content:
Techno Brain is a leading digital technology ﬁrm providing products and services across regions and empowering 
lives through innovation and skills transfer with operations in Africa, USA, India, UK and UAE.
Techno Brain is committed to deliver high quality, cost effective and off-the-shelf solutions to Governments, NGOs and 
Private organizations across the globe.
Our competencies and experience span the entire spectrum of ICT Solutions, IT Training and BPO / ITES services:
• Business & Technology Consulting
• Implementation Services System Integration
• Custom Sotiware Development and Product Development
• IT Infrastructure Services and Managed IT Services
• Business Process Outsourcing and IT Enabled Services
• IT Training, Education and Capacity BuildingTECHNO BRAIN HIGHLIGHTS
